The Asset Control Method - 18 Minute VSL Script

Opening Option #1:

If you're making less money than your parents did at your age - despite working twice as hard and being twice as educated - then you need to hear this...

Because what I'm about to share with you is going to completely flip everything you've been told about building wealth on its head.

My name is Marcus Hayes, but most people call me Mack, and three years ago I was exactly where a lot of people watching this video probably are right now. Trapped in the corporate rat race, watching my purchasing power shrink every month, wondering if I'd ever break free from living paycheck to paycheck.

But then I discovered something that completely flipped my understanding of wealth-building upside down, and that's let the over 300 men and women who I've shared this with do the same thing.

Like Joey, a guy who was completely trapped in a soul-crushing middle management job, to start making over $8,000 a month on the side.

And Sarah, who was doing Amazon deliveries just to make ends meet, achieve complete time freedom to be with her family.

Now, I know what you're thinking. "Here we go, another get-rich-quick scheme." But this isn't that. In fact, what I'm about to show you is the complete opposite of every side hustle, course, or business opportunity you've ever seen.

Because here's the truth that no one wants to admit...

The reason you're struggling financially isn't because you're not working hard enough. It's not because you need more skills, or a better job, or even more income.

The real problem is that you've been trying to solve what I call an "Asset Gap" problem with "Income Gap" solutions.

Opening Option #2:

I realized something was wrong when I had to ask permission to take my own birthday off.

Think about that for a second. I'm a grown adult, with a good job and a college degree, and I had to send a formal request to my boss, hoping he'd approve me taking a single day off to celebrate my own existence.

That was the moment the illusion shattered. The moment I understood that the "safe" corporate path I was on wasn't safe at all. It was a trap.

My name is Marcus Hayes, but most people call me Mack, and three years ago, that birthday request was my breaking point. I was trapped in the corporate rat race, watching my purchasing power shrink every month, and realizing that for all my hard work, I had less control over my life than ever.

But then I discovered something that completely flipped my understanding of wealth and freedom upside down, and it's the same discovery that has let over 300 men and women who I've shared this with do the same thing.

The real problem is that you've been trying to solve what I call an "Asset Gap" problem with "Income Gap" solutions.

Opening Option #3:

Most people work 40 years to afford retirement—but this strategy works in 40 weeks.

You know the plan they sell us: Work 40 hours a week for 40 years of your life, just to retire on 40% of the income you could barely live on in the first place. But what if that entire timeline was a lie?

What if you could build a retirement-level income, not in 40 years, but in the next 40 weeks?

My name is Marcus Hayes, but most people call me Mack, and three years ago I was staring down the barrel of that 40-year trap. But then I discovered a blueprint that completely short-circuits that timeline.

The reason the 40-year plan is failing you isn't your fault. It's because you're trying to solve what I call an "Asset Gap" problem with "Income Gap" solutions.



All Openings Continue Below:

And until you understand the difference, you'll stay trapped in the same cycle that's keeping 90% of Americans from ever building real wealth.

I'm going to show you the hidden truth about why every side hustle you've tried has failed... and reveal the one method wealthy people use to build cash-flowing assets that most people have never even heard of.

And no, I'm not talking about traditional real estate where you need $100,000 down payments. I'm not talking about the stock market, cryptocurrency, or starting another online business.

This is something completely different. Something that lets you control real, cash-flowing assets without the barriers that keep most people out.

Imagine waking up to money that was deposited into your account overnight - not from a boss paying you for yesterday's work, but from assets generating income while you slept.

Picture yourself in 18 months from now, controlling a portfolio of cash-flowing assets worth hundreds of thousands of dollars, generating $8,000 to $15,000 per month in passive income, with the freedom to work from anywhere or not work at all.



STORY OF STRUGGLE & DISCOVERY (3-4 minutes)

Three years ago, I was a 38-year-old logistics manager living in Austin, Texas. I was working 60-hour weeks, buried under student loan debt, and despite having what everyone considered a "good job," I was barely keeping my head above water.

Despite having a college degree, despite working twice as many hours, despite all the "opportunities" we supposedly have today... I was going backwards financially.

So like any desperate person, I started looking for a way out. I tried everything...

I spent $3,000 on an affiliate marketing course. Lost every penny. I tried Amazon FBA, invested $5,000 in inventory, and watched it sit in a warehouse while I got crushed by competition. I even tried freelancing on the side, but that just meant working 80 hours a week instead of 60.

After two years of failed attempts, I felt like a complete failure. But then I had a realization that changed everything...

All of these side hustles had the same fatal flaw. They were all about generating more income. But income has a ceiling. There are only 24 hours in a day.

That's when I discovered the difference between being "income rich" and being "asset rich."

Income rich means you make good money, but the moment you stop working, the money stops coming. Asset rich means you own things that generate money whether you're working or not.

Now, when you think about building assets that generate cash flow, your mind probably goes to real estate, right? But here's the problem - traditional real estate requires massive down payments, perfect credit, and the kind of money most of us will never have.

That's exactly why I thought real estate was off-limits for someone like me. But then I stumbled upon something that changed everything. A way to control cash-flowing real estate assets without needing to own them.

When I discovered this one method - something I now call the Asset Control Method - everything changed.



THE CORE PROBLEM EDUCATION (4-5 minutes)

Here's what they don't teach you in school...

There are two types of people in this world: those who trade time for money, and those who own assets that generate money.

The first group includes employees, freelancers, consultants. Even if they make good money, they're stuck in the "time trap." The moment they stop working, the money stops coming.

The second group owns assets. Real estate that generates rental income. Businesses that run without them. These people make money while they sleep.

Here's the brutal truth: The income gap between these two groups is getting smaller, but the asset gap is getting massive.

Twenty years ago, someone with a college degree could expect their income to grow faster than inflation. But those days are gone. Meanwhile, asset prices have skyrocketed. The average home price has tripled in the last 20 years.

This is why you can work twice as hard as your parents and still make less money. You're trying to solve an Asset Gap problem with Income Gap solutions.

Traditional real estate investing requires 20-25% down payments. On a $400,000 property, that's $80,000-$100,000 just to get started. The stock market requires massive amounts of capital to generate meaningful returns. Starting a traditional business has an 80% failure rate.

So what do most people do? They turn to side hustles. But affiliate marketing, dropshipping, Amazon FBA - they're all just different ways of trading time for money.

But here's what the wealthy know that no one talks about...

The real secret isn't owning assets. It's controlling assets.

When you think of real estate investing, you think of buying properties, right? But what if there's a way to control cash-flowing properties without owning them? To get all the benefits of asset ownership without the massive capital requirements?

We're in the middle of a housing crisis. There's a shortage of 4-6 million homes in America. People can't afford to buy, so they have to rent. This creates an unprecedented opportunity for people who understand how to bridge that gap.



THE SOLUTION REVEAL (3-4 minutes)

So what exactly is the Asset Control Method?

It's a way to gain operational control of cash-flowing rental properties without the traditional barriers of ownership. Instead of buying properties with massive down payments, you partner with property owners who want stable income without management headaches.

Here's how it works...

You find property owners who have traditional long-term rentals. These owners are tired of dealing with problem tenants, late payments, and all the headaches that come with being a landlord.

You approach them with a win-win proposition. You'll lease their property on a long-term basis, guaranteeing them stable monthly income. In exchange, you get the right to operate that property as a short-term rental.

You then set up the property, list it on platforms like Airbnb and VRBO, and capture the difference between what you pay the owner and what you collect from guests.

The owner gets guaranteed income with zero management responsibilities. You get cash flow from an asset you control without needing $100,000 down payments.

"Why would a property owner agree to this?"

Because you're solving real problems for them. Most small-time landlords hate being landlords. They bought rental properties for the income, but they hate dealing with tenants, maintenance calls, evictions.

With the Asset Control Method, they get guaranteed rent every month whether you have guests or not. They don't have to deal with tenant issues. And they can still benefit from property appreciation over time.

Here's my current portfolio as proof this works: I control 15 properties generating over $12,000 per month in passive income. I started with less than $15,000 three years ago, and now I have assets worth over $2.3 million under my control.

This isn't some get-rich-quick scheme. It's a legitimate business model that creates value for everyone involved. And because you're controlling assets instead of just trading time for money, this income is truly passive.

But here's the best part - this scales. Once you prove the model with one property, you can replicate it with multiple properties.



FUTURE PACING & VISION (2-3 minutes)

Let me paint a picture of what your life could look like 18 months from now...

Imagine waking up every morning to notifications showing money deposited into your account overnight. Not from a boss, but from guests who stayed in properties you control while you slept.

Imagine never having to ask permission for time off again. Because your income isn't dependent on you showing up to an office every day.

Imagine working from anywhere with just a laptop and internet connection. Your assets are generating cash flow whether you're there or not.

Here's the timeline of how this typically works...

In the first 90 days, you secure your first property partnership and get it generating income. Most people see their first booking within 2-3 weeks.

By month 6, you have 2-3 properties generating $4,000-$8,000 per month in passive income.

By month 12, you have 4-6 properties generating enough income to replace a significant portion of your job salary.

By month 18, you have 6-10 properties generating $10,000-$20,000 per month, and you have the choice of whether to keep your job or go full-time.

But it's not just about the money. It's about the respect and recognition that comes with being a successful entrepreneur. It's about building something you can pass down to your children.

This scales in two powerful ways. First, you can replicate the model with multiple properties. Second, as your cash flow grows, you can start transitioning from controlling properties to actually owning them.

That's not a fantasy. That's what happens when you focus on building assets instead of chasing income.



QUALIFICATION & CALL TO ACTION (3-4 minutes)

Now, before I tell you how to get started, I need to be completely honest...

This opportunity isn't for everyone. And frankly, I'm selective about who I work with.

This is for people who are tired of trading time for money and ready to build real wealth through assets. People who understand that building wealth requires an investment of time, money, and effort upfront.

This is for people who have been priced out of traditional real estate investing but still want to build a portfolio of cash-flowing properties.

But this is NOT for people looking for passive solutions that require no work. Building your portfolio requires effort and commitment.

This is NOT for people who expect to get rich overnight.

This is NOT for people who aren't willing to invest $5,000-$15,000 to get started with their first property.

If you're still with me, then you're probably wondering: "How do I actually get started?"

While the Asset Control Method is simple in concept, there are dozens of details that determine success or failure. How do you find the right properties? How do you approach property owners? What legal agreements do you need?

These details matter. The difference between success and failure often comes down to small things that you'd never think of unless someone taught you.

That's why I've developed a comprehensive system for teaching people exactly how to build their own asset portfolio. But I don't work with just anyone. I only take on a limited number of new students each quarter.

That's why the first step is a free Asset Control Strategy Session where we'll analyze your specific situation and create a customized roadmap for your success.

During this session, we'll look at your local market and identify opportunities. We'll review your financial situation and determine the optimal investment strategy. We'll create a realistic timeline for achieving your goals.

And most importantly, we'll determine if there's a mutual fit.

Even if we don't end up working together, you'll leave with a clear action plan and valuable insights.

But spots for these strategy sessions are limited. I only do a certain number each week because I personally review every application.

And with the current housing shortage creating unprecedented opportunities, demand is higher than ever.

So if you're serious about finally breaking free from the time-for-money trap and building real wealth through assets, you need to act now.

CLOSING REINFORCEMENT (1-2 minutes)

Look, I get it. You've probably been burned before by business opportunities that promised the world and delivered nothing.

But here's what I want you to understand...

You have two choices right now. You can keep doing what you're doing - trading time for money, hoping things will somehow get better, watching inflation eat away at your purchasing power.

Or you can take control of your financial future by learning how to build real wealth through assets.

The Asset Gap isn't going to fix itself. The system isn't going to suddenly start working in your favor. But opportunities like the Asset Control Method don't last forever.

I've shown you exactly what's possible. You've seen the proof. You understand the method.

The question is: what are you going to do about it?

The best time to start building wealth was 10 years ago. The second best time is right now.
